game.title.description: Name of the 2048 game card on the home screen.
game.title.notes: Do not translate the game name.

game.description.description: Short description of the 2048 game on the home screen.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the play button on the 2048 game card.

score.accessibilityLabel.description: Screen reader label for the current score.

actions.newGame.description: Button text to start a new game.

actions.newGameLabel.description: Accessibility label for the new game button.

actions.keepPlaying.description: Button text to continue playing after reaching 2048.

actions.keepPlayingLabel.description: Accessibility label for the keep playing button.

actions.quit.description: Button text to quit and return home.

actions.quitLabel.description: Accessibility label for the quit button.

swipe.hint.description: Hint text shown below the score to guide the player.

gameOver.title.description: Title shown when the game is over.

gameOver.body.description: Message shown when the game is over with the final score.

gameOver.newGame.description: Button text in game over overlay to start a new game.

gameOver.home.description: Button text in game over overlay to return home.

win.title.description: Title shown when the player reaches 2048.

win.body.description: Message shown when the player wins, encouraging them to continue.
